text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — new video models, elevenlabs tts, and surviving 524 timeouts.

───

→ MEDIA AND AUDIO
We added LTX-2, Imagen 3, Imagen 4, Flux-2-dev, and Grok Video (alpha). If it generates pixels, it is probably on the endpoint now. We also wired up an ElevenLabs TTS endpoint for audio.

→ TEXT AND INFRASTRUCTURE
Upgraded Claude to Opus 4.6 on Bedrock. We moved our Portkey gateway to a custom domain to stop 524 timeouts from ruining your day. Migrated Mistral to OVHcloud, immediately broke it via a config key case mismatch, and then fixed it.

→ USAGE TIERS
To keep the servers from melting, 5 heavy models are now paid-only. The free tier remains generous. We also added usage-by-tier panels to the dashboard so you can actually see what is happening.

→ GSOC
Cleaned up the READMEs and routing for Google Summer of Code contributors preparing for the season.

15 PRs merged this week. Code is open.
github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #WebDev #GSoC
